headline: TD Cowen Maintains Hold on Enphase Energy, Lowers Price Target to $48
summary: TD Cowen  analyst Jeff Osborne   maintains Enphase Energy (NASDAQ:ENPH) with a Hold and lowers the price target from $70 to $48.
